title: Onnappola Oruthana Lyrics Vetrivel
stanzas:
Onnappola Oruthana
naan paarthathe illa
o osarampaathu
vaanam kooda
kurugume mella

saamipoola vanthavane
kekummunne thanthavane
naan vanagum nallavane
nalla ullam koondavane
yen ottumotham
jenmathukkum saami neethane

Onnappola Oruthana
naan paarthathe illa
o osarampaathu
vaanam kooda
kurugume mella (2)

unna ethirpaathu thaan
ennithayam vazhuthathoo
thannai ariyaamale
unnai athu sernthathoo

illai ini eethum endru
vaadi nindra poothile
muthumani theril ennai
eetri vantha vallale

oru vaarthaiyil
ennai uravaakinai
un uravenpathu
yuga yugangalai
kadanthathu thaane

Onnappola Oruthana
naan paarthathe illa
o osarampaathu
vaanam kooda
kurugume mella

unnudaiya saalaiyil
nindru malar thoovave
kannivaram ketkiren
nanum arangerave

unnarukil vazhvathondru
pothum intha mannile
veru ondrum thevai illai
yaavum unthan anbile

enna aalave vantha magaraasane
naan unnakkagave
pala piravigal
thunai varuvenai

Onnappola Oruthana
naan paarthathe illa
o osarampaathu
vaanam kooda
kurugume mella (2)

saamipoola vanthavane
kekummunne thanthavane
naan vanagum nallavane
nalla ullam koondavane
yen ottumotham
jenmathukkum saami neethane

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Onnappola Oruthana?

The song conveys themes of love and devotion, expressing deep emotional connections between lovers.

What is the plot context of the song in Vetrivel?

This song plays during a romantic moment, highlighting the protagonist's feelings towards their beloved.

Who is the singer of Onnappola Oruthana?

The song is sung by the talented Shreya Goshal.

Who composed the music for Onnappola Oruthana?

The music is composed by D Imman, known for his melodious tunes.

When was Onnappola Oruthana released?

The song was released on April 22, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Onnappola Oruthana, the protagonist expresses their heartfelt emotions towards their beloved, encapsulating the essence of love. The soothing melody and Shreya Goshal's captivating voice create a romantic atmosphere that resonates with listeners. This song serves as a pivotal moment in Vetrivel, enhancing the emotional narrative of the film. The lyrics reflect a deep yearning and connection, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Onnappola Oruthana from Vetrivel is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Shreya Goshal's enchanting vocals and D Imman's soulful composition, this song creates an atmosphere of romance that resonates deeply. Experience the magic of this collaboration that elevates the emotional depth of the film.
stanzaMeanings: I haven't seen anyone like you, oh, the sky is slowly getting darker.
The one who comes close will ask, the one who gives will be me. I will respect the good one, the one with a good heart, you are the one who is everything to me, God, you are.
Only by waiting for you, my heart is troubled. Without knowing it, you have become a part of me.
No, now there is nothing, standing in the flower garden, the one who came to me is a precious gem.
With one word, you have made me yours, your presence has crossed ages.
Standing in your street, I am waiting to see flowers bloom, I am also asking for a chance.
In your presence, living is enough, in this world, there is no need for anything else, everything is in your love.
Whoever comes to me, oh king, I will bring many births just for you.
I haven't seen anyone like you, oh, the sky is slowly getting darker.
The one who comes close will ask, the one who gives will be me. I will respect the good one, the one with a good heart, you are the one who is everything to me, God, you are.
